full_description: Improve your productivity and concentration with FocusTimer. This app is designed to help you stay on track and avoid distractions. The Pomodoro timer allows you to work in focused, 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. You can also customize your work sessions to fit your needs. FocusTimer provides detailed statistics on your productivity, so you can track your progress and identify areas for improvement. With its simple and intuitive interface, FocusTimer is the perfect tool for anyone looking to boost their productivity and achieve their goals.
